title: Ritukos importance in NERV
wikitext: []: Rituko's importance in NERV             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Thu Nov 17, 2022 10:22 am I think Rituko is a good scientist, while she wasn't some super genius/invent this and that every time. Naoko is better than her on this. But she is a very important figure in NERV, Gendo thought he could control and use her due to their relationship. Obviously she knew Gendo's dirty deeds more than the others. She was also one of the few NERV leaders who could accept sacrifice pilot if necessary. To Mistao she is a close friend, to others she is also quite nice. So she is a very important figure to connect Gendo with the others and was acceptable by nearly everyone. However I think she mostly chose Gendo than the others so she hide some stuff from them. In the end she chose to go all by herself and failed as well.

Article: Ritukos importance in NERV
[]: Rituko's importance in NERV             Quote Post by Slowpokeking » Thu Nov 17, 2022 10:22 am I think Rituko is a good scientist, while she wasn't some super genius/invent this and that every time. Naoko is better than her on this. But she is a very important figure in NERV, Gendo thought he could control and use her due to their relationship. Obviously she knew Gendo's dirty deeds more than the others. She was also one of the few NERV leaders who could accept sacrifice pilot if necessary. To Mistao she is a close friend, to others she is also quite nice. So she is a very important figure to connect Gendo with the others and was acceptable by nearly everyone. However I think she mostly chose Gendo than the others so she hide some stuff from them. In the end she chose to go all by herself and failed as well.
